animation.build_init: Start building Prefix Sum array P
animation.build_calc: Calculate P[{{i}}]: Previous sum P[{{prev}}] ({{prevSum}}) + Current element A[{{i}}] ({{currentVal}})
animation.query_start: Start query: Calculate the sum of range [{{L}}, {{R}}]
animation.query_get_r: Step 1: Get prefix sum at right boundary P[{{R}}] = {{valR}}
animation.query_get_l: Step 2: Since L > 0, get prefix sum before left boundary P[{{prevL}}] = {{valL}}
animation.query_else: Step 2: Since L = 0, no need to subtract any prefix

ui.invalidRange: Please enter a valid range (Start, End) where 0 <= L <= R
